title: 7 Utility Stocks to Buy as Inflation's Grip Tightens

title: Dominion (D) Arm to Add 1,000 MW Clean Energy, Cut Emissions
text: Dominion's (D) Virginia unit receives necessary approval to add 1,000 MW of clean energy projects in Virginia. These projects are set to assist Dominion in achieving its carbon neutrality goal.

title: Significant Expansion of Solar and Energy Storage Approved for Dominion Energy Virginia Customers
text: New projects total nearly 1,000 megawatts, enough to power about 250,000 homes Projects will support 4,200 jobs and $880 million in economic activity RICHMOND, Va. , March 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Virginia State Corporation Commission (SCC) approved on Tuesday a significant expansion of new solar and energy storage projects for Dominion Energy Virginia customers.

title: Dominion Energy Utah Launches New Program to Reduce Customers' Carbon Footprint
text: SALT LAKE CITY , March 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy customers in Utah and Idaho can now sign up for CarbonRight, a new and affordable way to significantly reduce their carbon footprint. The program will allow customers to offset carbon emissions from natural gas use in their home or business by supporting projects, including in Utah, that reduce greenhouse gas emissions.

title: Consumer Protection Week: How to Identify a Utility Scammer
text: RICHMOND, Va., March 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- In observance of National Consumer Protection Week (Mar. 6 – 12), Dominion Energy reminds customers how to spot utility scams and the best ways to stay safe.

title: Dominion Energy Offers $1 Million in Critical Community Needs Grants
text: RICHMOND, Va., March 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy is inviting nonprofit organizations across the company's footprint to apply for grants of up to $25,000 each to meet critical needs in communities.

title: Dominion Energy Partners with The Hispanic Association of Colleges and Universities to Develop Hispanic Leaders for the Energy Industry
text: RICHMOND, Va., March 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Dominion Energy today announced a partnership with The Hispanic Association of Colleges and Universities (HACU), supporting seven higher education institutions in Virginia, North Carolina, Connecticut, Utah, and Puerto Rico.
